commit.message:
Add README with architecture overview, setup, and API docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement notification system with server cluster, workers, emulators, and load testing

- Notification server: REST API, input validation, template rendering, Redis caching, RabbitMQ routing
- Notification worker: 4 dedicated queue consumers (APNS/FCM/SMS/EMAIL) with retry logic
- Third-party emulator: simulates delivery services with 95% success rate
- Device emulator: receives notifications, WebSocket broadcast, REST stats
- Load client: seeds test data, multi-threaded load test with p95/p99 reporting
- Infrastructure: PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, Prometheus, Grafana with pre-provisioned dashboard
- Docker Compose with service health checks and replicas
- 27 unit tests covering validation, services, controllers, consumers
- Component diagram in drawio format

Fix desktop aiming: player-to-cursor instead of screen-center-relative

Aim angle now computed as atan2(cursorWorld - playerWorld), matching

feat(layer2): add auth, parser, OCR, chunker, and React frontend

bd-3: Token auth middleware - Bearer token validation on /api/* routes,
/api/health exempt. 401 on missing/invalid tokens.

bd-5: File parser module - text extraction from .txt, .md, .html, .pdf,
.docx with format detection and error handling.

bd-6: OCR module - Tesseract.js with Claude Vision API fallback when
confidence < 70%. Supports PNG, JPG, TIFF, BMP.

bd-9: Text chunker - sentence-aware splitting at ~500 tokens with
~50 token overlap, section header preservation.

bd-18: React frontend scaffolding - Vite + React Router with Upload,
Triage, Search, Browse pages, nav layout, and auth token management.

commit.message:
Fix iOS silent mode: route all audio through MediaStreamDestination → HTMLAudioElement

AudioContext alone always respects the iOS mute switch. By piping all output
through createMediaStreamDestination() and an <audio> element, iOS uses the
'playback' AVAudioSession category which ignores the silent switch.

- retrieve_with_scores(): wRRF 점수 분해 반환 (keyword/graph/embedding/annotation)
  + confidence level (high/medium/low) 포함 → LLM 판단 근거 제공
- suggest_next(): 그래프 REQUIRES/PRECEDES 엣지 기반 다음 tool 추천
  + history 인식으로 이미 호출한 tool 순위 하향
- 한글 쿼리 정규화: 조사 제거 (을/를/이/가 등) + 활용형→어간 변환

commit.message:
Add note: two context boundaries govern collection operations

Any note collection faces two context boundaries — a full-text boundary
where all bodies can be loaded, and an index boundary where all
titles+descriptions fit. This creates three operational regimes and
explains why /connect's index-first strategy works, why descriptions
become load-bearing at scale, and why library/workshop separation is
an operational necessity.

commit.message:
Add theory note: good agentic KBs maximize contextual competence through reach

Three properties (discoverable, composable, trustworthy) serve contextual
competence under bounded context. Three learning operations improve them:
stabilisation → trustworthiness, distillation → discoverability,
discovery → composability. Deutsch's reach criterion distinguishes
knowledge that transfers (explanatory) from knowledge that merely fits
(adaptive). Discovery creates reach, distillation preserves or destroys
it, stabilisation is neutral.

Linked from kb-design (Design Principles) and learning-theory (Synthesis).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: improve IPTV ffmpeg buffering and latency for Docker (#52)

* fix: improve IPTV ffmpeg buffering and latency for Docker deployments

Remove the -re flag which rate-limits input reading to native frame rate,
preventing ffmpeg from buffering ahead on live streams. Add low-latency
input flags (+nobuffer, +discardcorrupt, low_delay) and reduce CRF/bitrate
caps to better suit WebRTC delivery under Docker CPU constraints.

Extract buildFfmpegArgs into a testable private method.

Fix mobile overlay position — add display:block to card-poster-container

The <a> tag for .card-poster-container was inline by default, which
doesn't reliably establish a positioning context on mobile Safari.
The absolute-positioned overlay was referencing a parent further up,
causing a ~150px left offset. Adding display:block fixes this.

commit.message:
feat: implement Windows DXGI Desktop Duplication backend (closes #4)

- backend_windows.h/.cpp: full DXGICaptureBackend implementation
  - Enumerates all adapters/outputs to support multi-GPU setups
  - Creates D3D11 device on the adapter owning the target monitor
  - Runs IDXGIOutputDuplication capture loop on a background thread
  - Converts DXGI BGRA to Godot RGBA8 in the CPU copy pass
  - Composites cursor using COLOR (pre-multiplied alpha blend) and
    MONOCHROME (AND+XOR mask) pointer shape types
  - Recovers from DXGI_ERROR_ACCESS_LOST with up to 5 retries
- desktop_capture_texture: wire in DXGICaptureBackend under #ifdef _WIN32
  - set_enabled(true) allocates backend, dispatches frames to render thread
    via RS::call_on_render_thread + callable_mp
  - set_enabled(false) stops and deletes backend, emits capture_stopped
  - get_monitor_count/get_monitor_size delegate to backend static helpers
- SConstruct: add _WIN32_WINNT=0x0602 define for Windows builds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Phase 5 — hardening, deployment, and CI/CD

Optimistic UI:

Prompt injection guardrails:
- security.ts: sanitizeQuery, generateCanaryToken, sanitizeAgentOutput

- sanitizeAgentOutput on synthesis inputs (narrative, crossMarketInsight, reasoning)
- Canary token embedded in synthesis system prompt for leak detection

Latency budget enforcement:
- timeout.ts: withTimeout<T> utility using Promise.race
- Per-agent timeouts: supervisor 3s, quantitative 5s, qualitative 4s, research 3s
- 11s overall pipeline timeout with graceful fallback to direct market data

Deployment config:
- Security headers: HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy
- Upstash Redis rate limiting middleware (10 req/60s/IP, no-op without credentials)
- vercel.json pinning region to iad1
- engines: node>=20.0.0 in package.json
- Input validation: max 50 messages, max 4000 chars per message

CI/CD:
- .github/workflows/ci.yml: lint + test + build on push/PR to main

commit.message:
Fix post-payment login flow and session lock timeout

After Stripe checkout, users were redirected to the login page instead of
being auto-logged into their new tenancy due to a race condition between
the Stripe redirect and webhook provisioning. Additionally, concurrent
auth operations caused NavigatorLockManager lock timeouts during subdomain
handoff.

- Poll for tenant_users row after payment (up to 18s) to handle webhook delay
- Unify session check and token restore into a single sequential flow to
  prevent lock contention between getSession() and setSession()
- Auto-redirect to tenant subdomain after provisioning completes
- Show "Setting up your building..." status during provisioning wait
- Extract shared loginWithTenantUser helper to reduce duplication

commit.message:
fix: resolve 74 review issues across all layers (wave 4)

9 parallel agents fixed issues from docs/issues/ covering:
- ACP permission gate: forward-compatible isGranted(), buildPermissionRequest() abstraction (ISS-002/003/017/097/098/102/103)
- ACP session/agent: history replay TODO clarified, commands emitter discriminator, authenticate return type (ISS-008/063/065/066/069/091/108/142/146/147)
- Sessions manager: setConfigOption returns SDK-typed config, state transition validation (ISS-001/014/067/068/070/101)
- MCP bridge: tool result content forwarded to ACP client instead of empty block (ISS-005/075/105/106)
- Hooks/IPC/services: HookContext typed fields, _goodvibes/ namespace keys, entry validation (ISS-004/019/020/071-074/113/143-145)
- Core layer: prefix wildcard handlers, restore validation, config validation (ISS-036-039/058/059/092-096/100/149/161-163)
- Agent loop/WRFC: max_tokens stop reason preserved, content blocks in WRFC updates (ISS-007/031-033/049/055/057/107/121/128/150)
- Types: SessionConfigOptionType narrowed to 'select', PermissionOption aligned to SDK, Directive requires sessionId (ISS-009/011/015/034/035/056/099/109/110/120/141/148)
- Plugins: fs abstraction in db tools, input validation, analytics key fix (ISS-050/051/054/115/117/119/126/127)

All cascading type errors resolved. TypeScript compiles clean.
